description: You are a Medical Device Integration Specialist at an academic medical center, preparing for IHE (Integrating the Healthcare Enterprise) Connectathon testing. Conduct a simulated DEC (Device Enterprise Communication) profile conformance pre-test using the OpenICE Supervisor. Create a simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapter and a simulated Noninvasive Blood Pressure (NIBP) device adapter, both acting as Device Observation Reporters (DOR). Launch the Vital Signs clinical application (Device Observation Consumer) and confirm data from both devices appears. Capture a screenshot of the Vital Signs app with device data to /home/ga/Desktop/conformance_evidence_vitals.png and a screenshot of the OpenICE Supervisor device list to /home/ga/Desktop/conformance_evidence_devices.png. Write a formal IHE DEC conformance test report to /home/ga/Desktop/dec_conformance_report.txt including sections for TEST IDENTIFICATION, DEVICE UNDER TEST (DUT) INVENTORY, CLINICAL APPLICATION (DOC) CONFIGURATION, DATA FLOW VERIFICATION RESULTS, and OVERALL CONFORMANCE ASSESSMENT (mentioning DDS as transport middleware).
domain: Biomedical Engineering - Medical Device Interoperability Standards
